candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Only a component of current assets, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current assets, wrong section.

candidates.row_label: Other Current Assets - Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value for a component, not total current assets.
Wrong section and balancing item.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Subset excluding restricted cash; less preferable than the explicit total cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending balance; useful cross-check but balance sheet item is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not the balance-sheet target.

candidates.row_label: Net increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Change in cash, not the stock of cash.

candidates.row_label: Foreign currency efects on cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX effect, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit balance-sheet cash line over unrestricted cash subset or cash-flow balances.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Component only, not total current liabilities.
Component only, not total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Wrong section.

candidates.row_label: Other Current Liabilities - Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value for a component, not total current liabilities.
Wrong section and balancing item.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Exact semantic match for short-term debt/current portion of long-term debt, and explicitly excludes leases as required.
Could contain financial debt, but too broad and ambiguous versus explicit current portion of long-term debt.
Current debt-like item but lease liabilities must be excluded under the baseline STD rule.
Interest accrual related to debt, not principal short-term debt itself.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Chose an exact non-lease short-term debt label outside the candidate shortlist. Blank previews do not invalidate a semantically correct row.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Also a direct current tax payable label; useful alternative across years if naming changes.

variables.notes: Provided both explicit tax-payable labels as a priority list because labels appear to vary across years.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet proxy for property, plant and equipment; represents net tangible fixed assets.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Tangible but lease-related subset only, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related gross subset, not total PPE.
Wrong asset class for PPE.

candidates.row_label: Investments in tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Cash flow item, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: No explicit 'Property, plant and equipment' line is shown; 'Tangible Assets' is the best balance-sheet equivalent under IFRS-style presentation.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Other Current Assets - Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Component balancing value, not total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net cash provided from operating activities
candidates.why: Exact match for operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash provided from operating activities
